name: agent-governance
description: Portable governed implementation workflow with a plugin-owned task registry CLI and 1600-line source limit.

interface.shortDescription: Governed gap closure, registry, and source-limit workflow.
interface.longDescription: Agent Governance installs repo-local instructions, hooks, skills, a Rust task registry CLI, mutation gates, posture checks, a hard 1600-line source/governance limit, deterministic split planning, and local measurement receipts for approved implementation contracts.
defaultPrompt: Install agent governance in this repo.
Activate this plan into the task registry.
Verify registry posture and workflow metrics.
